headline: Nvidia Is Building The Brain — Palantir May Control The $50 Trillion Physical AI System
summary: The AI story is changing. For the past two years, it's been about models, chatbots, and copilots. But as Nvidia Corp CEO Jensen Huang recently framed it, the real opportunity ahead isn't digital—it's physical. Robots, autonomous vehicles, factories, logistics systems. A market he pegs at $50 trillion. And that shift is starting to redraw the AI stack. At the center of it is Nvidia. But just as important may be what sits atop it.
